config.name: NOCturne
config.content:
<!--
  NOCturne
  Alert noise you can dance to.
  Single-file LogicMonitor dashboard widget.

  Turns active alerts into a generative, quantized song using the Web Audio API.
  No media files: every sound is synthesized in the browser. Pitch is quantized
  to a five-note scale and time to a 16-step beat grid, over a bass, pad, and
  drum bed, so the live alert stream sounds like music instead of a soundboard.

    severity   -> register + waveform + loudness   (critical = low and buzzy)
    resource   -> a fixed scale degree              (same device = same motif)
    alert load -> note density                      (quiet NOC = ambient, incident = busy)
    ack / sdt  -> quieter in the mix

  The alert pane has four views: named chips; a Hive of severity-colored
  hexagons (ACK light blue, SDT purple); Cluster, a night sky where each
  device's alerts pack in a golden-angle rosette around its hashed home spot;
  and Skyline, one tower per device with alerts stacked as lit floors (capped
  at the 250 noisiest devices). Big loads switch to the Hive on their own
  until a view is picked by hand.

  Three reference panels open from the footer icons: Help (how it works, what
  quantized means, a glossary), Reference (every value in NOC_CONFIG, read-only),
  and Settings (the same values as live controls, with copy/paste config and a
  reset to defaults).

  Requires an admin to enable Settings > Security > Allow Scripts in Dashboard
  Text Widget. Browser autoplay rules also mean a viewer must click Play once
  per session before any sound plays.

  Lineage: reborn from Song of Alerts (sample-based, kept in the LM Widget Lab).
  Sound prototyped in lab-nocturne.html. Descended from the Better Topo Widget.
--><div data-noc-widget="" class="noc-widget"><style>
    [data-noc-widget] {
      --bg: #060b1c;
      --panel: rgba(18, 28, 52, 0.9);
      --panel-2: rgba(12, 20, 42, 0.55);
      --panel-3: rgba(8, 14, 32, 0.6);
      --line: rgba(132, 160, 220, 0.22);
      --line-soft: rgba(132, 160, 220, 0.10);
      --text: #e9f0ff;
      --muted: #93a6cf;
      --faint: #5f719c;
      --accent: #6ea8ff;
      --play: #29e3e8;
      --warning: #ffd21f;
      --error: #ff8a3d;
      --critical: #ff4d6a;
      --good: #51e3a3;
      --ack: #6ea8ff;
      --sdt: #b388ff;
      box-sizing: border-box;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      min-width: 320px;
      min-height: 400px;
      overflow: hidden;
      position: relative;
      color: var(--text);
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 88% -8%, rgba(110, 168, 255, 0.16), transparent 42%),
        radial-gradient(circle at -6% 112%, rgba(164, 91, 255, 0.10), transparent 44%),
        var(--bg);
      font: 14px/1.5 "Inter", "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif;
    }
    [data-noc-widget] * { box-sizing: border-box; }
    .noc-inner { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; padding: 16px 18px; gap: 12px; }

    /* ---- shared control vocabulary -------------------------------------- */
    .noc-btn {
      font: inherit; color: var(--text); background: rgba(110, 168, 255, 0.10);
      border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 10px; padding: 9px 14px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap;
      transition: filter 0.12s, transform 0.05s, background 0.12s, border-color 0.12s, color 0.12s;
    }
    .noc-btn:hover { filter: brightness(1.12); border-color: var(--accent); }
    .noc-btn:active { transform: translateY(1px); }
    .noc-btn.active { background: var(--accent); color: #04122a; border-color: transparent; font-weight: 700; }
    .noc-btn.storm { background: rgba(255, 77, 106, 0.16); border-color: var(--critical); color: #ffd7df; font-weight: 700; }
    .noc-btn.storm.active { background: var(--critical); color: #2a0008; }
    .noc-btn[disabled] { opacity: 0.55; cursor: default; }
    .noc-select {
      font: inherit; color: var(--text); background: rgba(8,14,34,0.8);
      border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 9px; padding: 9px 10px; cursor: pointer;
    }

    /* ---- panel system --------------------------------------------------- */
    .noc-panel { background: var(--panel-2); border: 1px solid var(--line-soft); border-radius: 13px; padding: 10px 13px 12px; }
    .noc-panel-label { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--faint); font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 9px; }
    .noc-panel-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }

    /* ---- zone 1: transport deck ----------------------------------------- */
    .noc-head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; }
    .noc-head-left { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
    .noc-title { font-size: 21px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.3px; }
    .noc-title b { color: var(--accent); font-weight: 800; }
    .noc-title .tag { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 500; }
    .noc-sub { color: var(--muted); font-size: 12px; margin-top: 1px; font-style: italic; }
    .noc-deck {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; padding: 12px 14px;
      border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 14px;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(30,42,74,0.80), rgba(12,20,42,0.80));
      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.04), 0 10px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.28);
    }
    .noc-source { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; }
    .noc-deck-div { width: 1px; height: 40px; background: var(--line); }
    .noc-transport { display: flex; gap: 9px; align-items: center; }
    .noc-icon {
      width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-size: 15px; background: rgba(110,168,255,0.12); border: 1px solid var(--line); color: var(--text); cursor: pointer;
      transition: filter 0.12s, transform 0.05s, background 0.12s;
    }
    .noc-icon:hover { filter: brightness(1.14); }
    .noc-icon:active { transform: translateY(1px); }
    .noc-icon.rec { color: var(--critical); }
    .noc-icon.rec.armed { background: var(--critical); color: #2a0008; animation: nocrec 1s ease-in-out infinite; }
    @keyframes nocrec { 50% { filter: brightness(1.45); } }
    .noc-icon.play { background: var(--play); color: #04201f; border-color: transparent; }
    .noc-icon.hero { width: 60px; height: 60px; font-size: 23px; border-radius: 16px; }
    .noc-icon.hero:hover { filter: brightness(1.08); }
    .noc-icon.play.hero { box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(41,227,232,0.16), 0 8px 26px rgba(41,227,232,0.45); }

    /* ---- zone 2: performance rack --------------------------------------- */
    .noc-rack { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 11px; }

    /* ---- scale + audio synth: slider/number controls -------------------- */
    .noc-synth-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 22px; }
    .noc-ctl { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 9px; min-width: 0; }
    .noc-ctl-head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; }
    .noc-ctl-name { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); white-space: nowrap; }
    .noc-ctl-num {
      width: 58px; text-align: right; font: inherit; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; color: var(--text);
      background: rgba(8,14,34,0.75); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 7px; padding: 3px 7px;
    }
    .noc-ctl-num:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); }
    .noc-ctl-range { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 100%; height: 6px; border-radius: 4px;
      background: rgba(132,160,220,0.22); outline: none; cursor: pointer; }
    .noc-ctl-range::-webkit-slider-thumb { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--accent); cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(110,168,255,0.6); border: none; }
    .noc-ctl-range::-moz-range-thumb { width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--accent); cursor: pointer; border: none; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(110,168,255,0.6); }

    /* ---- zone 3: monitor ------------------------------------------------ */
    .noc-counts { display: flex; gap: 9px; }
    .noc-count {
      flex: 1; background: var(--panel); border: 1px solid var(--line);
      border-left: 3px solid var(--severity-color, var(--line)); border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 12px 9px;
    }
    .noc-count-label { color: var(--muted); font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.6px; }
    .noc-count-body { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 9px; }
    .noc-count-value { font-size: 26px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--severity-color, var(--text)); line-height: 1.05; }
    .noc-meter { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 2px; height: 26px; flex: 1; padding-bottom: 3px; }
    .noc-meter span { flex: 1; min-width: 2px; height: 8%; border-radius: 1px; background: var(--severity-color, var(--muted)); opacity: 0.55; transition: height 0.09s linear; }

    .noc-active { flex: 1; min-height: 70px; overflow: auto; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; align-content: flex-start; }
    .noc-chip {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; padding: 6px 11px; border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid var(--line); background: rgba(8,14,34,0.6); font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; height: fit-content;
    }
    .noc-chip:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }
    .noc-chip .dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--severity-color, var(--muted)); }
    .noc-chip.ack .dot { background: var(--ack); }
    .noc-chip.sdt .dot { background: var(--sdt); }
    .noc-chip.acked { opacity: 0.5; }
    .noc-chip.storm { border-style: dashed; border-color: var(--critical); }
    .noc-chip.flash { animation: nocflash 0.4s ease-out; }
    @keyframes nocflash { from { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.32); } to { background: rgba(8,14,34,0.6); } }
    /* Hive view: LM-style honeycomb. Each alert is a hexagon colored by severity
       (ACK light blue, SDT purple), name on hover, so hundreds fit in one pane
       and stay clickable. */
    .noc-hive .noc-active { gap: 5px; }
    .noc-hive .noc-chip {
      width: 26px; height: 30px; flex: 0 0 auto; padding: 0; border: none; border-radius: 0;
      background: var(--severity-color, var(--muted));
      clip-path: polygon(50% 0, 100% 25%, 100% 75%, 50% 100%, 0 75%, 0 25%);
    }
    .noc-hive .noc-chip:hover { filter: brightness(1.35); }
    .noc-hive .noc-chip .dot, .noc-hive .noc-chip .nm { display: none; }
    .noc-hive .noc-chip.acked { opacity: 1; }
    .noc-hive .noc-chip.ack { background: var(--ack); }
    .noc-hive .noc-chip.sdt { background: var(--sdt); }
    .noc-hive .noc-chip.storm { animation: nochexstorm 1.1s ease-in-out infinite; }
    @keyframes nochexstorm { 50% { filter: brightness(1.6); } }
    .noc-hive .noc-chip.flash { animation: nochexflash 0.45s ease-out; }
    @keyframes nochexflash { from { filter: brightness(2.4); } to { filter: brightness(1); } }
    /* Cluster view: a fixed night sky. Each alert is a star placed by its
       resource hash (same device, same spot), severity sets size, notes twinkle. */
    .noc-cluster .noc-active { position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
    .noc-cluster .noc-chip {
      position: absolute; left: calc(var(--sx, 50%) + var(--dx, 0px)); top: calc(var(--sy, 50%) + var(--dy, 0px));
      width: var(--sz, 9px); height: var(--sz, 9px); padding: 0; margin: 0;
      border: none; border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--severity-color, var(--muted));
      box-shadow: 0 0 calc(var(--sz, 9px) * 1.1) var(--severity-color, var(--muted));
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    }
    .noc-cluster .noc-chip:hover { filter: brightness(1.6); }
    .noc-cluster .noc-chip .dot, .noc-cluster .noc-chip .nm { display: none; }
    .noc-cluster .noc-chip.acked { opacity: 1; }
    .noc-cluster .noc-chip.ack { background: var(--ack); box-shadow: 0 0 calc(var(--sz, 9px) * 1.1) var(--ack); }
    .noc-cluster .noc-chip.sdt { background: var(--sdt); box-shadow: 0 0 calc(var(--sz, 9px) * 1.1) var(--sdt); }
    .noc-cluster .noc-chip.storm { animation: nocstartwinkle 1.1s ease-in-out infinite; }
    @keyframes nocstartwinkle { 50% { filter: brightness(1.9); } }
    .noc-cluster .noc-chip.flash { animation: nocstarflash 0.5s ease-out; }
    @keyframes nocstarflash { from { filter: brightness(2.6); transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.7); } to { filter: brightness(1); transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); } }
    /* Skyline view: one tower per device, alerts stacked as lit floors,
       so the noisiest device is the tallest building on the block. */
    .noc-skyline .noc-active { position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
    .noc-skyline .noc-chip {
      position: absolute; left: var(--cx, 50%); bottom: calc(var(--ck, 0) * 10px + 4px);
      width: clamp(4px, var(--cw, 14px), 26px); height: 9px; padding: 0; margin: 0;
      border: none; border-radius: 2px; transform: translateX(-50%);
      background: var(--severity-color, var(--muted));
      box-shadow: 0 0 5px var(--severity-color, var(--muted));
    }
    .noc-skyline .noc-chip:hover { filter: brightness(1.5); }
    .noc-skyline .noc-chip .dot, .noc-skyline .noc-chip .nm { display: none; }
    .noc-skyline .noc-chip.acked { opacity: 1; }
    .noc-skyline .noc-chip.ack { background: var(--ack); box-shadow: 0 0 5px var(--ack); }
    .noc-skyline .noc-chip.sdt { background: var(--sdt); box-shadow: 0 0 5px var(--sdt); }
    .noc-skyline .noc-chip.storm { animation: nocstartwinkle 1.1s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .noc-skyline .noc-chip.offmap { display: none; } /* beyond the device cap: not in the skyline, still in the song */
    .noc-skyline .noc-chip.flash { animation: noccityflash 0.5s ease-out; }
    @keyframes noccityflash { from { filter: brightness(2.6); } to { filter: brightness(1); } }
    .noc-empty { color: var(--muted); padding: 10px 2px; }
    .noc-error { color: var(--critical); }
    .noc-now { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 9px 13px; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-left: 3px solid var(--severity-color, var(--accent)); border-radius: 11px; background: rgba(8,14,34,0.5); min-height: 40px; }
    .noc-now-label { color: var(--muted); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 1.5px; font-weight: 700; }
    .noc-now-text { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
    .noc-now.hit { animation: nocnow 0.35s ease-out; }
    @keyframes nocnow { from { background: rgba(110,168,255,0.2); } to { background: rgba(8,14,34,0.5); } }
    .noc-viz { background: var(--panel-3); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 13px; padding: 11px 12px; }
    .noc-beat { display: flex; gap: 5px; margin-bottom: 9px; }
    .noc-beat span { flex: 1; height: 12px; border-radius: 4px; background: rgba(132,160,220,0.16); transition: background 0.05s, box-shadow 0.05s; }
    .noc-beat span.on { background: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 12px var(--accent); }
    .noc-beat span.downbeat { outline: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); }
    canvas[data-scope] { width: 100%; height: 120px; display: block; }

    /* ---- zone 4: footer ------------------------------------------------- */
    .noc-foot { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; color: var(--muted); font-size: 11px; border-top: 1px solid var(--line-soft); padding-top: 9px; }
    .noc-foot-icons { display: flex; gap: 6px; }
    .noc-ver { align-self: center; color: var(--faint); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; margin-right: 3px; }
    .noc-util-btn {
      width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 7px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-size: 13px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--line-soft); color: var(--faint); cursor: pointer;
      transition: filter 0.12s, transform 0.05s, color 0.12s, border-color 0.12s;
    }
    .noc-util-btn:hover { color: var(--text); border-color: var(--accent); }
    .noc-util-btn:active { transform: translateY(1px); }
    .noc-util-btn svg { width: 15px; height: 15px; display: block; }

    /* ---- modal: help (cog reuses this shell later) ---------------------- */
    .noc-modal { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 20; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 22px; background: rgba(4,8,18,0.74); }
    .noc-modal[hidden] { display: none; }
    .noc-modal-card { width: 100%; max-width: 1100px; max-height: 90%; overflow: auto; background: var(--panel); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 24px 70px rgba(0,0,0,0.55); }
    .noc-help-grid { column-count: 2; column-gap: 32px; }
    .noc-help-grid .noc-sec { break-inside: avoid; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .noc-modal-head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 14px 18px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); font-weight: 700; position: sticky; top: 0; background: var(--panel); }
    .noc-modal-x { background: transparent; border: none; color: var(--muted); font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; line-height: 1; }
    .noc-modal-x:hover { color: var(--text); }
    .noc-modal-body { padding: 16px 18px 20px; }
    .noc-lead { margin: 0 0 11px; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--text); }
    .noc-modal-intro { margin: 0 0 11px; color: var(--muted); }
    .noc-modal-intro:last-of-type { margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .noc-sec { margin-bottom: 18px; }
    .noc-sec-title { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 9px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line-soft); padding-bottom: 5px; }
    .noc-row { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin: 8px 0; font-size: 12.5px; align-items: baseline; }
    .noc-row-key { flex: 0 0 116px; color: var(--text); font-weight: 600; }
    .noc-row-val { flex: 0 0 138px; color: var(--accent); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .noc-row-desc { flex: 1; color: var(--muted); }
    .noc-gloss { column-count: 2; column-gap: 32px; margin-top: 4px; }
    .noc-gloss .noc-row { break-inside: avoid; margin: 6px 0; }
    .noc-gloss .noc-row-key { flex: 0 0 96px; }
    /* The host page styles bare table/th/td elements, so reset everything it
       could set; this is the only real <table> in the widget. */
    .noc-tbl { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 12.5px; background: none !important; border: 0 !important; margin: 0; }
    .noc-tbl th { text-align: left; color: var(--faint) !important; font-weight: 600; font-size: 11px; padding: 4px 8px; background: none !important; border: 0 !important; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line-soft) !important; text-decoration: none !important; }
    .noc-tbl td { padding: 5px 8px; color: var(--text) !important; background: none !important; border: 0 !important; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line-soft) !important; }
    .noc-tbl td:first-child { text-transform: capitalize; color: var(--accent) !important; font-weight: 600; }

    /* ---- cog settings panel --------------------------------------------- */
    .noc-cog-grid { column-count: 2; column-gap: 32px; }
    .noc-cog-grid .noc-sec { break-inside: avoid; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .noc-cfg-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 148px 1fr 60px; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin: 7px 0; font-size: 12.5px; }
    .noc-cfg-label { color: var(--muted); }
    .noc-cfg-range { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; height: 5px; border-radius: 4px; background: rgba(132,160,220,0.22); outline: none; cursor: pointer; }
    .noc-cfg-range::-webkit-slider-thumb { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--accent); cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(110,168,255,0.6); border: none; }
    .noc-cfg-range::-moz-range-thumb { width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--accent); border: none; box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(110,168,255,0.6); }
    .noc-cfg-num { width: 60px; text-align: right; font: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); background: rgba(8,14,34,0.75); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 6px; padding: 2px 6px; }
    .noc-cfg-num:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); }
    .noc-cfg-sel, .noc-cfg-text { grid-column: 2 / -1; font: inherit; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text); background: rgba(8,14,34,0.8); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 6px; padding: 4px 7px; }
    .noc-cfg-ro { grid-column: 2 / -1; color: var(--faint); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
    .noc-cog-io { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-top: 6px; padding-top: 14px; border-top: 1px solid var(--line); }
    .noc-cog-status { color: var(--good); font-size: 12px; }
  </style><div class="noc-inner"><div class="noc-head"><div class="noc-head-left"><div class="noc-title">NOC<strong>turne</strong></div><div class="noc-sub">Alert noise you can dance to</div></div><div class="noc-deck"><div class="noc-source"><button class="noc-btn" data-load="">Load</button> <select class="noc-select" data-limit="" title="How many alerts to load"> <option value="50">50</option> <option value="100">100</option> <option value="250">250</option> <option value="500">500</option> </select> <button class="noc-btn" data-clear="" title="Clear all alerts">Clear</button></div><div class="noc-deck-div"><br></div><div class="noc-transport"><button class="noc-icon" data-stop="" title="Stop">■</button> <button class="noc-icon play hero" data-play="" title="Play">▶</button> <button class="noc-icon rec" data-record="" title="Record a clip">●</button></div></div></div><div class="noc-rack"><div class="noc-panel" style="flex:0 0 auto;"><div class="noc-panel-label">View</div><div class="noc-panel-row"><button class="noc-btn active" data-view="chips" title="Named chips with state dots">Chips</button> <button class="noc-btn" data-view="hive" title="One hexagon per alert, names on hover, fits hundreds">Hive</button> <button class="noc-btn" data-view="cluster" title="Alerts cluster as stars around their device, twinkling as they play">Cluster</button> <button class="noc-btn" data-view="skyline" title="One tower per device, alerts stacked as lit floors">Skyline</button></div></div><div class="noc-panel" style="flex:0 0 class="noc-count" style="--severity-color: var(--error);"><div class="noc-count-label">Error</div><div class="noc-count-body"><div class="noc-count-value" data-count-error="">0</div><div class="noc-meter" data-meter="error"><br></div></div></div><div class="noc-count" style="--severity-color: var(--warning);"><div class="noc-count-label">Warning</div><div class="noc-count-body"><div class="noc-count-value" data-count-warning="">0</div><div class="noc-meter" data-meter="warning"><br></div></div></div><div class="noc-count" style="--severity-color: var(--ack);"><div class="noc-count-label">ACK</div><div class="noc-count-body"><div class="noc-count-value" data-count-ack="">0</div><div class="noc-meter" data-meter="ack"><br></div></div></div><div class="noc-count" style="--severity-color: var(--sdt);"><div class="noc-count-label">SDT</div><div class="noc-count-body"><div class="noc-count-value" data-count-sdt="">0</div><div class="noc-meter" data-meter="sdt"><br></div></div></div></div><div class="noc-active" data-active=""><div class="noc-empty">Press Load to pull active alerts, then press Play. Storm injects an intense burst you can push mid-song.</div></div><div class="noc-now" data-now=""><span class="noc-now-label">NOW</span> <span class="noc-now-text" data-now-text="">Load to pull active alerts, then press Play to start the track</span></div><div class="noc-viz"><div class="noc-beat" data-beat=""><br></div><canvas data-scope=""><br></canvas></div><div class="noc-foot"><span data-status="">Idle</span> <span data-updated="">No alerts loaded</span><div class="noc-foot-icons"><span class="noc-ver">v1.0</span> <button class="noc-util-btn" data-info="" title="Help"> <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"></circle><path d="M9.4 9.3a2.7 2.7 0 0 1 5.1 1.1c0 1.8-2.5 2.1-2.5 3.6"></path><line x1="12" y1="17" x2="12" y2="17.01"></line></svg> </button> <button class="noc-util-btn" data-ref="" title="Reference"> <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="6.5" cy="17.5" r="2.3"></circle><circle cx="17" cy="15.5" r="2.3"></circle><path d="M8.8 17.5V6.2l10.4-2.2v11.5"></path></svg> </button> <button class="noc-util-btn" data-cog="" title="Settings"> <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"></circle><path d="M12 2.6v3.2M12 18.2v3.2M21.4 12h-3.2M5.8 12H2.6M18.6 5.4l-2.3 2.3M7.7 16.3l-2.3 2.3M18.6 18.6l-2.3-2.3M7.7 7.7 5.4 5.4"></path></svg> </button></div></div></div><div class="noc-modal" data-help="" hidden=""><div class="noc-modal-card"><div class="noc-modal-head"><span>How NOCturne works</span><button class="noc-modal-x" data-help-close="" title="Close">✕</button></div><div class="noc-modal-body"><p class="noc-lead">Every sound is synthesized live with the Web Audio API; there are no samples. Each active alert drives one oscillator note, with pitch and timing both quantized so the alert stream comes out as music instead of beeps.</p><p class="noc-modal-intro">Pitch is snapped to a five-note scale built from a 55 Hz root, where each degree is a set number of semitones above it: frequency = 55 × 2^(semitones / 12). Severity sets the octave, waveform, gain, and duration of the note. Each resource is hashed to a fixed scale degree, so it always sounds the same pitch. The number of active alerts sets how many notes play per bar, and all of it is locked to a 16-step beat grid over a bass, pad, and drum bed. ACK and SDT alerts are scaled down in gain.</p><div class="noc-sec"><div class="noc-sec-title">What "quantized" means</div><p class="noc-modal-intro">It means snapped to a fixed grid of allowed values instead of landing anywhere. Two grids are in play.</p><div class="noc-row"><span class="noc-row-key">Pitch</span><span class="noc-row-desc">An alert never plays an arbitrary frequency. It is snapped to a note in the active scale, the handful of semitone steps above the 55 Hz root, so out-of-key pitches cannot happen and any combination of alerts stays in tune.</span></div><div class="noc-row"><span class="noc-row-key">Time</span><span class="noc-row-desc">A note does not fire the instant its alert is processed. It is snapped to the nearest slot on a 16-step-per-bar beat grid, so notes land on the beat instead of scattering. That is the difference between rhythm and random clicks.</span></div><p class="noc-modal-intro" style="margin-top:9px;">Same idea a drum machine uses when it snaps your notes to the grid: take a continuous value and round it to the nearest point on a defined grid. Open Reference for every value, or Settings to change them.</p></div><div class="noc-sec"><div class="noc-sec-title">Glossary</div><div class="noc-gloss"><div class="noc-row"><span class="noc-row-key">Semitone</span><span class="noc-row-desc">The smallest step in Western tuning, one twelfth of an octave. Each semitone multiplies frequency by 2^(1/12).</span></div><div class="noc-row"><span class="noc-row-key">Octave</span><span class="noc-row-desc">A doubling of frequency. The same note an octave up sounds twice as high, and spans 12 semitones.</span></div><div class="noc-row"><span class="noc-row-key">Root</span><span class="noc-row-desc">The base pitch the scale is built from. Here it is 55 Hz, the note A1.</span></div><div class="noc-row"><span class="noc-row-key">Scale degree</span><span class="noc-row-desc">A numbered slot in the scale. Degree 0 is the root, and this build uses five of them.</span></div><div class="noc-row"><span class="noc-row-key">Pentatonic</span><span class="noc-row-desc">A five-note scale. Its spacing is why almost any mix of its notes sounds consonant.</span></div><div class="noc-row"><span class="noc-row-key">Waveform</span><span class="noc-row-desc">The shape of the oscillator wave, which sets timbre. Sine is pure and soft, sawtooth bright and buzzy.</span></div><div class="noc-row"><span class="noc-row-key">Gain</span><span class="noc-row-desc">Loudness, the amplitude of a sound.</span></div><div class="noc-row"><span class="noc-row-key">Pan</span><span class="noc-row-desc">Stereo position, anywhere from full left to full right.</span></div><div class="noc-row"><span class="noc-row-key">Bar</span><span class="noc-row-desc">A repeating group of beats. Here each bar is 16 steps.</span></div><div class="noc-row"><span class="noc-row-key">Bed</span><span class="noc-row-desc">The backing under the melody: bass, pad, kick, and hat.</span></div><div class="noc-row"><span class="noc-row-key">Pad</span><span class="noc-row-desc">A soft, sustained chord that fills the space behind the notes.</span></div><div class="noc-row"><span class="noc-row-key">Motif</span><span class="noc-row-desc">A short musical idea that recurs. Here, each resource's fixed note.</span></div><div class="noc-row"><span class="noc-row-key">Reverb</span><span class="noc-row-desc">Synthesized space, the tail a sound leaves in a room.</span></div><div class="noc-row"><span class="noc-row-key">Lowpass</span><span class="noc-row-desc">A filter that removes highs. The Tone knob opens and closes it.</span></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="noc-modal" data-ref-modal="" hidden=""><div class="noc-modal-card"><div class="noc-modal-head"><span>Reference</span><button class="noc-modal-x" data-ref-close="" title="Close">✕</button></div><div class="noc-modal-body"><div class="noc-help-grid" data-ref-body=""><br></div></div></div></div><div class="noc-modal" data-cog-modal="" hidden=""><div class="noc-modal-card"><div class="noc-modal-head"><span>Sound settings</span><button class="noc-modal-x" data-cog-close="" title="Close">×</button></div><div class="noc-modal-body"><div class="noc-cog-grid" data-cog-body=""><br></div><div class="noc-cog-io"><button class="noc-btn" data-cfg-copy="">Copy config</button> <button class="noc-btn" data-cfg-paste="">Paste config</button> <button class="noc-btn" data-cfg-reset="">Reset to defaults</button> <span class="noc-cog-status" data-cfg-status=""></span></div></div></div></div><script>
  (function () {
    // document.currentScript can be null when the host runs this inline script
    // outside the normal HTML parse (changed in LM v239). Fall back to the first
    // unclaimed widget root, then claim it: two copies on one dashboard each
    // wire their own root, and a re-run of this script can't double-wire one.
    const here = document.currentScript;
    const root = (here && here.closest && here.closest("[data-noc-widget]"))
      || document.querySelector("[data-noc-widget]:not([data-noc-init])");
    if (!root || root.hasAttribute("data-noc-init")) return;
    root.setAttribute("data-noc-init", "1");
    const q = (sel) => root.querySelector(sel);

    let csrfToken = "";

    function positiveInt(value, fallback, min, max) {
      const parsed = Number.parseInt(value, 10);
      if (!Number.isInteger(parsed)) return fallback;
      return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, parsed));
    }
    const SETTINGS = { limit: 50, tempo: 96 };

    // ---- Same-origin LogicMonitor auth ----------------------------------
    async function parseResponse(resp) {
      const text = await resp.text();
      let body = null;
      try { body = text ? JSON.parse(text) : null; } catch { body = { rawText: text.slice(0, 800) }; }
      if (!resp.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${resp.status}: ${text.slice(0, 220)}`);
      return body;
    }
    async function getCsrfToken() {
      if (csrfToken) return csrfToken;
      const resp = await fetch("/santaba/rest/functions/dummy", {
        method: "GET", credentials: "include",
        headers: { "X-Csrf-Token": "Fetch", "Accept": "application/json", "X-Version": "3" }
      });
      csrfToken = resp.headers.get("X-Csrf-Token") || "";
      if (!csrfToken) throw new Error("No CSRF token returned from /functions/dummy");
      return csrfToken;
    }
    async function lmRequest(method, path, version, body) {
      const token = await getCsrfToken();
      const headers = { "Accept": "application/json", "X-Csrf-Token": token, "X-Version": String(version) };
      const options = { method, credentials: "include", headers };
      if (body != null) { headers["Content-Type"] = "application/json"; options.body = JSON.stringify(body); }
      const resp = await fetch("/santaba/rest" + path, options);
      return parseResponse(resp);
    }

    // ---- Alert fetch (ported from the sample-based predecessor) ----------
    const SEV_API = ["CRITICAL", "ERROR", "WARNING"];
    function alertFilterBody(pageSize, pageOffsetCount) {
      return { meta: { filters: { alerts: { dynamic: [] }, filterType: "FILTER_CATEGORICAL_MODEL_TYPE" },
        columns: [{ alerts: ["id","isSDT","isACK","isCleared","severity","reportedAtMS","monitoredObjectId","moduleId","instanceId","datapointId","alertValue","threshold"].join(",") }],
        paging: { perPageCount: pageSize, pageOffsetCount },
        sort: "reportedAtMS", perPageCount: pageSize, pageOffsetCount,
        filter: { isCleared: "NO", isEscalation: "ALL", isSDT: "ALL", isACK: "ALL",
          "moduleId->name": [{ mode: "INCLUDE", expression: ["*"] }],
          "instanceId->name": [{ mode: "INCLUDE", expression: ["*"] }],
          severity: { mode: "INCLUDE", expression: SEV_API },
          duration: { units: "YEARS", offset: 3 } } } };
    }
    function alertsFromPayload(payload) {
      const a = (payload && payload.byId && payload.byId.alerts)
        || (payload && payload.data && payload.data.byId && payload.data.byId.alerts) || {};
      return Object.keys(a).map((k) => a[k]).filter(Boolean);
    }
    function normalizeSeverity(value) {
      const raw = String(value || "").toLowerCase();
      if (raw.includes("critical") || raw === "4") return "critical";
      if (raw.includes("error") || raw === "3") return "error";
      if (raw.includes("warn") || raw === "2") return "warning";
      return "";
    }
    function bundleDisplay(v) {
      if (v == null || v === "") return "";
      if (Array.isArray(v)) return v.map(bundleDisplay).filter(Boolean).join(", ");
      if (typeof v === "object") return v.displayName || v.name || v.id || "";
      return String(v);
    }
    function compactName(value) {
      return String(value || "Unknown").trim().replace(/^.*\//, "").slice(0, 64);
    }
    function shortName(value) {
      return String(value || "").trim().replace(/^.*\//, "").slice(0, 40); // empty if absent
    }
    function numStr(v) {
      if (v == null || v === "") return "";
      const n = Number(v);
      return Number.isFinite(n) ? String(Math.round(n * 100) / 100) : String(v).slice(0, 16);
    }
    function formatAge(ms) {
      if (!ms) return "";
      const diff = Math.max(0, Date.now() - ms), m = Math.floor(diff / 60000);
      if (m < 60) return m + "m";
      const h = Math.floor(m / 60);
      if (h < 48) return h + "h " + (m % 60) + "m";
      return Math.floor(h / 24) + "d";
    }
    function normalizeAlert(alert) {
      const resourceName = bundleDisplay(alert.monitoredObjectId)
        || (alert.resourceId ? "Resource " + alert.resourceId : "Unknown resource");
      const raw = Number(alert.reportedAtMS || 0);
      return {
        id: "live-" + String(alert.id ?? Math.random()),
        severity: normalizeSeverity(alert.severity ?? alert.level),
        name: compactName(resourceName),
        module: shortName(bundleDisplay(alert.moduleId)),
        datapoint: shortName(bundleDisplay(alert.datapointId) || bundleDisplay(alert.instanceId)),
        value: numStr(alert.alertValue),
        threshold: numStr(alert.threshold),
        ageMs: raw ? (raw > 9999999999 ? raw : raw * 1000) : 0,
        tag: alert.isSDT ? "SDT" : (alert.isACK ? "ACK" : ""),
        acked: !!(alert.isACK || alert.isSDT)
      };
    }
    async function fetchAlerts(limit) {
      const pageSize = Math.min(limit, 100);
      const all = [];
      for (let page = 0; all.length < limit; page += 1) {
        const payload = await lmRequest("POST", "/alerts/filters", 4, alertFilterBody(pageSize, page));
        const items = alertsFromPayload(payload);
        all.push(...items);
        if (items.length < pageSize) break;
        if (page > 40) break; // safety
      }
      return all.slice(0, limit);
    }

    // ====================================================================
    //  Synth engine (mirror of lab-nocturne.html)
    // ====================================================================
    let ctx = null, master = null, out = null, analyser = null, running = false, noiseBuffer = null;

    function makeImpulse(seconds, decay) {
      const rate = ctx.sampleRate, len = Math.floor(rate * seconds);
      const buf = ctx.createBuffer(2, len, rate);
      for (let ch = 0; ch < 2; ch++) {
        const d = buf.getChannelData(ch);
        for (let i = 0; i < len; i++) d[i] = (Math.random() * 2 - 1) * Math.pow(1 - i / len, decay);
      }
      return buf;
    }
    function buildGraph() {
      ctx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
      master = ctx.createGain(); master.gain.value = 1.0;
      out = ctx.createGain(); out.gain.value = 0.0;
      analyser = ctx.createAnalyser(); analyser.fftSize = 2048;
      const comp = ctx.createDynamicsCompressor();
      comp.threshold.value = -8; comp.knee.value = 6; comp.ratio.value = 12; comp.attack.value = 0.003; comp.release.value = 0.25;
      out.connect(comp);
      comp.connect(analyser); analyser.connect(ctx.destination);
      const streamDest = ctx.createMediaStreamDestination(); comp.connect(streamDest); // tapped by Record (post-limiter)

      const lowpass = ctx.createBiquadFilter();
      lowpass.type = "lowpass"; lowpass.frequency.value = filterFreq(parseInt(q("[data-filter]").value, 10) || 42); lowpass.Q.value = 0.6;
      const delay = ctx.createDelay(); delay.delayTime.value = (60 / SETTINGS.tempo) / 2 * 0.75;
      const feedback = ctx.createGain(); feedback.gain.value = NOC_CONFIG.fx.echoFeedback;
      const delayWet = ctx.createGain(); delayWet.gain.value = NOC_CONFIG.fx.echoWet;
      const reverb = ctx.createConvolver(); reverb.buffer = makeImpulse(3.4, 2.0);
      const reverbWet = ctx.createGain();
      const dryGain = ctx.createGain();
      const sp0 = (parseInt(q("[data-space]").value, 10) || 0) / 100;
      reverbWet.gain.value = revWetGain(sp0);
      dryGain.gain.value = revDryGain(sp0);

      master.connect(lowpass);
      lowpass.connect(dryGain); dryGain.connect(out);
      lowpass.connect(delay); delay.connect(feedback); feedback.connect(delay); delay.connect(delayWet); delayWet.connect(out);
      lowpass.connect(reverb); reverb.connect(reverbWet); reverbWet.connect(out);

      const len = Math.floor(ctx.sampleRate * 0.2);
      noiseBuffer = ctx.createBuffer(1, len, ctx.sampleRate);
      const d = noiseBuffer.getChannelData(0);
      for (let i = 0; i < len; i++) d[i] = Math.random() * 2 - 1;
      master._delay = delay;
      master._lowpass = lowpass;
      master._reverbWet = reverbWet;
      master._dry = dryGain;
      master._delayWet = delayWet;
      master._feedback = feedback;
      master._stream = streamDest;
    }

    // ====================================================================
    //  NOC_CONFIG: every value that shapes a note, in one place. The cog
    //  settings panel reads and writes this; the ? panel explains it. A
    //  frozen DEFAULTS copy backs Reset. Not persisted (Copy/Paste config
    //  moves it as JSON).
    // ====================================================================
    const DEFAULTS = {
      rootHz: 55,                 // A1, the lowest reference pitch
      scales: { minor: [0, 3, 5, 7, 10], major: [0, 2, 4, 7, 9], dark: [0, 1, 5, 7, 8] },
      sev: {
        warning:  { octave: 3, type: "sine",     gain: 0.22, dur: 0.4 },
        error:    { octave: 2, type: "triangle", gain: 0.28, dur: 0.5 },
        critical: { octave: 1, type: "sawtooth", gain: 0.34, dur: 0.7 }
      },
      ackedMultiplier: 0.4,       // ACK/SDT alerts play this fraction as loud
      panSpread: 1.2,             // motif degree spread across the stereo field
      density: { curve: [2, 4, 8, 12], scale: 1.0 }, // notes/bar by load tier, then scaled
      bed: {
        barRoots: [0, 4, 2, 0],   // scale-degree root per bar, loops
        bassGain: 0.34,
        padGain: 0.10,            // pad level, and a touch louder when busy
        padGainBusy: 0.14,
        kickEvery: 8,             // kick every Nth step
        hatStep: 2,               // hat on inBar % 4 === hatStep (offbeat)
        // Stub for the deferred bed work. Shaped now, engine ignores it.
        layers: { bass: true, pad: true, kick: true, hat: true },
        preset: "ambient",
        presets: {
          ambient:  { label: "Ambient",      barRoots: [0, 4, 2, 0], swing: 0,    timeFeel: 1 },
          driving:  { label: "Driving",      barRoots: [0, 0, 3, 4], swing: 0,    timeFeel: 1 },
          halftime: { label: "Half-time",    barRoots: [0, 5, 3, 4], swing: 0,    timeFeel: 0.5 },
          lounge:   { label: "Swung lounge", barRoots: [0, 3, 4, 2], swing: 0.55, timeFeel: 1 }
        },
        swing: 0,
        timeFeel: 1
      },
      oneShot: { clickDur: 1.3, clickGain: 1.25, stormDur: 1.4, stormGain: 1.3, stormPan: 1.4 },
      fx: { reverb: 11, echoWet: 0.1, echoFeedback: 0.18 } // reverb defaults to 11 because of course it does
    };
    let NOC_CONFIG = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(DEFAULTS));
    let currentMood = "minor";
    let SCALE = NOC_CONFIG.scales[currentMood];
    function freqFromIndex(i) {
      const n = SCALE.length, oct = Math.floor(i / n), step = ((i % n) + n) % n;
      return NOC_CONFIG.rootHz * Math.pow(2, (SCALE[step] + 12 * oct) / 12);
    }
    function filterFreq(v) { return 180 * Math.pow(8000 / 180, Math.max(0, Math.min(100, v)) / 100); }
    function revWetGain(sp) { return sp * 1.2; }       // reverb wet rises to 1.2 at full
    function revDryGain(sp) { return 1 - 0.7 * sp; }   // reverb dry falls to 0.3 at full
    function pluck({ freq, type = "triangle", time, dur = 0.45, gain = 0.3, pan = 0 }) {
      const osc = ctx.createOscillator(); osc.type = type; osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, time);
      const amp = ctx.createGain();
      amp.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001, time);
      amp.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(gain, time + 0.006);
      amp.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(Math.max(0.0001, gain * 0.3), time + dur * 0.5);
      amp.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, time + dur);
      const pan2 = ctx.createStereoPanner(); pan2.pan.value = pan;
      osc.connect(amp); amp.connect(pan2); pan2.connect(master);
      osc.start(time); osc.stop(time + dur + 0.05);
    }

    q("[data-cog-modal]").addEventListener("click", (e) => { if (e.target === q("[data-cog-modal]")) q("[data-cog-modal]").hidden = true; });
    q("[data-cfg-copy]").addEventListener("click", () => {
      const text = JSON.stringify(NOC_CONFIG, null, 2);
      if (navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.writeText) navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(() => setCfgStatus("Config copied")).catch(() => window.prompt("Copy the config:", text));
      else window.prompt("Copy the config:", text);
    });
    q("[data-cfg-paste]").addEventListener("click", () => {
      const handle = (text) => { if (!text) return; try { applyConfig(JSON.parse(text)); setCfgStatus("Config applied"); } catch (e) { setCfgStatus("Invalid config JSON"); } };
      if (navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.readText) navigator.clipboard.readText().then(handle).catch(() => handle(window.prompt("Paste config JSON:", "")));
      else handle(window.prompt("Paste config JSON:", ""));
    });
    q("[data-cfg-reset]").addEventListener("click", () => { applyConfig(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(DEFAULTS))); setCfgStatus("Reset to defaults"); });

    // ---- Slider + number controls: keep each pair in sync, paint the fill.
    function setupCtl(ctl) {
      const range = ctl.querySelector('input[type="range"]');
      const num = ctl.querySelector('input[type="number"]');
      const min = parseFloat(range.min), max = parseFloat(range.max), span = (max - min) || 1;
      const paint = () => {
        const f = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (parseFloat(range.value) - min) / span)) * 100;
        range.style.background = "linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent) " + f.toFixed(1) + "%, rgba(132,160,220,0.22) " + f.toFixed(1) + "%)";
        if (num && document.activeElement !== num) num.value = range.value;
      };
      paint();
      range.addEventListener("input", paint);
      if (num) {
        const apply = (clampBlur) => {
          let v = parseFloat(num.value);
          if (isNaN(v)) { if (clampBlur) num.value = range.value; return; }
          v = Math.max(min, Math.min(max, v));
          if (clampBlur) num.value = String(v);
          if (String(v) === range.value) return;
          range.value = String(v);
          range.dispatchEvent(new Event("input", { bubbles: true }));
        };
        num.addEventListener("input", () => apply(false));
        num.addEventListener("change", () => apply(true));
      }
    }
    root.querySelectorAll("[data-ctl]").forEach(setupCtl);

    drawScope();
  })();
  </script></div>
